text: إِنَّا مُنْزِلُونَ‌ عَلَى‌ أَهْلِ‌ هٰذِهِ‌ الْقَرْيَةِ رِجْزاً مِنَ‌ السَّمَاءِ بِمَا کَانُوا يَفْسُقُونَ‌

en.ahmedali: We have to bring a scourge from the heavens on the people of this city as they are depraved."
en.ahmedraza: “We will indeed cause a punishment from the sky to descend upon the inhabitants of this town – the recompense of their disobedience.”
en.arberry: We shall send down upon the people of this city wrath out of heaven for their ungodliness.'
en.daryabadi: Verily we are about to bring down upon the inhabitants of this city a scourge from the heaven, for they have been transgressing.
en.hilali: Verily, we are about to bring down on the people of this town a great torment from the sky, because they have been rebellious (against Allah's Command)."
en.itani: “We will bring down upon the people of this town a scourge from heaven, because of their wickedness.”
en.maududi: We shall bring down upon the people of this city a scourge from the heaven because of their evildoing.”
en.mubarakpuri: "Verily, we are about to bring down on the people of this town a great torment from the sky, because they have been rebellious."
en.pickthall: Lo! We are about to bring down upon the folk of this township a fury from the sky because they are evil-livers.
en.qarai: We are indeed going to bring down upon the people of this town a punishment from the sky because of the transgressions they used to commit.’
en.qaribullah: We shall send down anger out of heaven upon the people of this city because they are debauchers.
en.sahih: Indeed, we will bring down on the people of this city punishment from the sky because they have been defiantly disobedient."
en.sarwar: We will bring torment from the sky on this town because of the evil-deeds of its inhabitants".
en.shakir: Surely We will cause to come down upon the people of this town a punishment from heaven, because they transgressed.
en.transliteration: Inna munziloona AAala ahli hathihi alqaryati rijzan mina alssamai bima kanoo yafsuqoona
en.wahiduddin: We are surely going to bring down a punishment from heaven on the people of this town because of their depravities."
en.yusufali: "For we are going to bring down on the people of this township a Punishment from heaven, because they have been wickedly rebellious."
fa.ansarian: ما بر اهل این شهر به علت کار بسیار زشتی که مرتکب می شوند، عذاب سختی از آسمان نازل خواهیم کرد.
fa.ayati: ما بر مردم اين قريه به سبب فسقى كه مرتكب مى‌شوند، از آسمان عذاب نازل مى‌كنيم.
fa.bahrampour: ما بر مردم اين شهر به سزاى اين كه فسق مى‌كردند عذابى از آسمان فرو خواهيم فرستاد
fa.fooladvand: ما بر مردم اين شهر به [سزاى‌] فسقى كه مى‌كردند، عذابى از آسمان فرو خواهيم فرستاد.
fa.ghomshei: ما بر اهل این دیار که فاسق و بدکارند از آسمان عذابی سخت نازل کنیم.
fa.khorramdel: ما بر اهل این شهر عذابی از آسمان به خاطر نافرمانی و فسق و فجورشان نازل خواهیم کرد. [[«مُنزِلُونَ»: فرود آورندگان. نازل کنندگان. «رِجْزاً»: عذاب. (نگا: حجر / 74).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ما بر اهل این شهر به خاطر نافرمانی ورزیدنشان عذابی از آسمان فرود می‌آوریم‌
fa.makarem: ما بر اهل این شهر و آبادی به خاطر گناهانشان، عذابی از آسمان فرو خواهیم ریخت!»
fa.moezzi: همانا مائیم فرستنده بر مردم این شهر چرکی را از آسمان بدانچه بودند نافرمانی می‌کردند
fa.mojtabavi: ما بر مردم اين شهر به سزاى آن نافرمانى و بدكارى كه مى‌كردند عذابى از آسمان فرو مى‌آريم.
fa.sadeqi: «ما بر مردم این قریه به (سزای) فسقی که می‌کرده‌اند، بی‌چون فرودآورنده‌ی عذابی پلید [:سنگ گل] از آسمانیم.»
